forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly clear, with a low around 21. South wind around 8 mph.

forecast.name: Saturday
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly sunny, with a high near 47. Southwest wind 7 to 10 mph, with gusts as high as 23 mph.

weather_report:
As the night lingers on in Boston, the air is a crisp harbinger of late winter, hinting at the chill of the early morning. The sky holds onto its clarity, revealing occasional stars that peek through the depths of darkness, while a soft warmth—a gentle sigh from the south—drifts through, adding a tender touch to the cool atmosphere. This tranquil phase will soon give way to the promise of a bright Saturday, where the sun will rise to unveil the city in vibrant hues, illuminating the streets with warmth as temperatures nudge toward the mid-forties.

With this delightful transformation on the horizon, one might slip into a comfortable wool sweater layered over a well-fitted shirt, complemented by a scarf to ward off the morning briskness. Sturdy shoes are a wise choice for those inclined to meander through the endless paths of Boston, where the historic streets invite exploration. A stroll along the Charles River promises a serene escape, while cafes nestled in quaint corners await with the comforting aroma of freshly brewed coffee. Perhaps a visit to the local bookstore, with its shelves teeming with stories that beckon, would provide a peaceful retreat to relish in the day ahead.
